final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand exposure advertisement for OPPO Find X9 Ultra full-screen new product launch.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand exposure aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product launch campaigns, Samsung Galaxy flagship launch visuals, OnePlus minimalist tech advertising; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be vertical 9:16 format optimized for mobile screen capture
Subject: must include OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone as the hero product
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech launch atmosphere — exact environment design is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, high-contrast atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, attention-grabbing direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek tech surface treatment — exact finish and reflectivity is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO" brand name, "Find X9 Ultra" product name
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 resolution, brand exposure priority, visual impact first
Avoid:
